meta.title: The Ambassadors Series: French Ambassador Discusses the Evolving U.S.-French Relationship part 1
meta.description: On October 29th, Hudson Institute hosted Gérard Araud, ambassador of France to the United States, for a discussion about the current state of U.S.-French relations, moderated by Distinguished Fellow and Ravenel B. Curry Chair Walter Russell Mead. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
